completed_tasks.name: Build binary and prepare test environment
Human verification — multiple bug-fix rounds in progress
completed_tasks.progress: Seven bugs fixed across two sessions. Last fix (useLayoutEffect re-apply for CSS Custom Highlight) not yet confirmed by user.

remaining_tasks.name: User confirms all 8 test scenarios pass

human_actions_pending.action: Run binary with test command and verify all 8 checkpoint scenarios pass, especially selection highlight visibility
human_actions_pending.context: The last fix adds a useLayoutEffect (no deps) to re-apply the CSS Custom Highlight after every React render. This addresses the hypothesis that React DOM reconciliation was invalidating Range objects. User was about to test when they paused.

decisions.decision: Force a/ b/ prefixes in git2 DiffOptions
decisions.rationale: User has diff.mnemonicPrefix=true globally; @pierre/diffs regex only matches a/ and b/ prefixes

decisions.decision: Switch from PatchDiff to FileDiff with parsePatchFiles
decisions.rationale: PatchDiff requires exactly 1 file; working tree had 3 changed files

decisions.decision: Wrap non-reviewing states div in appState !== reviewing condition
decisions.rationale: Empty flexGrow:1 div was competing with two-column layout, halving its height
selectionchange fires constantly during drag causing React re-render pressure on selection anchor

decisions.decision: useTextSelection: only clear selectedText on mouseup within plan container
decisions.rationale: Clicks in sidebar must not dismiss annotation pills — only intentional clicks in plan area clear selection

decisions.decision: CSS Custom Highlight API (selection-lock) for focus-independent visual
decisions.rationale: Native browser selection goes inactive-gray or invisible when focus moves to sidebar; CSS highlights are focus-independent
If browser lacks CSS.highlights, keep native selection visible as fallback rather than clearing to nothing

decisions.decision: useLayoutEffect (no deps) re-applies highlight after every render
decisions.rationale: React DOM reconciliation may invalidate Range objects stored in Highlight; re-pinning before each paint keeps it visible
After adding annotation, text gets a colored background matching the type — no DOM mutation, no range invalidation

decisions.decision: Replace highlightAnchor DOM mutation with CSS.highlights hover
decisions.rationale: DOM mark-wrapping breaks cross-element selections and invalidates stored ranges; CSS highlights are non-destructive

decisions.decision: Escape key dismisses active text selection
decisions.rationale: Standard dismiss affordance; only fires when denyOpen is false
Range objects are DOM artifacts, not serializable; stored in ref by annotation ID to enable persistent CSS highlights and hover

next_action: Ask user if the useLayoutEffect fix resolved the selection highlight visibility. If yes: commit all changes, write 02-04-SUMMARY.md, update ROADMAP/STATE, run /gsd:code-review 2 and /gsd:verify-work. If no: add console.log inside applyHighlight to verify it is called post-render, and check if Range is valid (range.collapsed, range.startContainer.isConnected).
context_notes: Phase 02 plan 02-04 human verification. Plans 01-03 committed. Plan 04 Task 1 done. Task 2 is an extended bug-fix session spanning two Claude sessions. Bugs fixed: (1) mnemonicPrefix diff format, (2) PatchDiff multi-file, (3) flexGrow layout, (4) selectionchange→mouseup, (5) focus-out clears selection→CSS Custom Highlight, (6) highlight not visible after render→useLayoutEffect re-apply. Also implemented full selection UX: persistent annotation type highlights, hover via CSS highlights, Escape dismiss, annotationRangesRef. Last fix not yet user-confirmed.
